hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command" 2>/dev/null); PROTECTED="(\.claude/settings\.json|scripts/pre-commit-check\.sh)"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "(git restore|git checkout|rm|rm -rf|rm -f).*$PROTECTED"; then echo "❌ BLOCKED: Cannot delete or restore protected hook files (.claude/settings.json, scripts/pre-commit-check.sh)"; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "^git commit|&& git commit|; git commit"; then bash /home/muhammed/monorepo/console/scripts/pre-commit-check.sh; else exit 0; fi'

bash -c 'CONTENT=$(jq -r ".tool_input.content // .tool_input.new_string // empty" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE "eslint-disable|@ts-ignore|@ts-nocheck|@ts-expect-error"; then echo "❌ BLOCKED: Do not use eslint-disable, @ts-ignore, @ts-nocheck, or @ts-expect-error. Fix the issue properly."; exit 2; fi; exit 0'
